metadata.description: Benchmark dataset for evaluating BhashaAI dialect and Hinglish translations.

dataset.english: Please complete the documentation process before submitting the application.
dataset.expected_hinglish: Please documentation process complete kar lo before application submit karne se pehle.

dataset.english: The government has introduced a new digital authentication framework.
dataset.expected_hinglish: Government ne ek naya digital authentication framework introduce kiya hai.

dataset.english: Can you explain the implementation strategy for this project?
dataset.expected_hinglish: Kya tum is project ki implementation strategy explain kar sakte ho?
